name: Luther Vandross
abstract: Luther Ronzoni Vandross Jr. ( VAN-drohss; April 20, 1951 – July 1, 2005) was an American R&B and soul singer, songwriter, and record producer.

works_created.t: The Wiz: A Brand New Day

about_quotes.speaker: David Spinozza
about_quotes.evidence: Luther wrote and sang all the background parts. And all they sang through the whole song is “Doesn’t she know by now.”
about_quotes.doc_title: David Spinozza interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, NY, September 27, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I work with people who have worked with ... Luther Vandross ... And it’s a skill. How to blend with the vocalist. I did an album for Suzanne Vega several years ago ... about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Brubeck
about_quotes.evidence: the background singer coach was this guy named Luther, Luther Vandross
